untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'stomach low' (support level) and 'previous high point (A)' which are not defined quantitatively in source text and cannot be mapped to available indicators. Exit target of '$2 gain per share' is price-dependent and requires position entry price context not available in indicator-only rules.
translation_notes: Translated 'rising volume trend' as volume > sma_20. Translated 'price gaps open higher' as open > prev_close (gap up condition). Stop loss estimated at 2% based on conservative risk profile mentioned. Exit conditions are partially untranslatable due to vague reference levels in source material.
